{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Auditor",
  "description": "Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market. The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands.

Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos.&nbsp;Yimei focuses on delivering quality hospitality services by combining modern hotel management systems, customer-centric service, and strategic business expansion. The company also supports hotel owners and investors through professional management solutions, operational systems, and market-driven strategies.

Driven by a vision to become a leading hotel operator in Africa, Yimei Nigeria Limited continues to grow its presence by developing new properties and expanding partnerships within the hospitality industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Internal Auditor to evaluate and improve the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance processes.
	The ideal candidate will have experience in the hospitality industry and will ensure compliance with financial regulations, company policies, and operational standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct regular audits of financial records, operational processes, and internal controls
	Review revenue streams including room sales, POS transactions, and other hospitality-related income
	Verify accuracy of financial reports, reconciliations, and accounting records
	Monitor compliance with company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Identify risks, control gaps, and areas for process improvement
	Prepare audit reports and present findings with actionable recommendations
	Follow up on audit issues to ensure timely resolution
	Perform inventory audits (food &amp; beverage, store, and other operational assets)
	Evaluate fraud risks and support investigations where necessary
	Collaborate with finance and operations teams to strengthen internal controls.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in auditing, preferably within the hospitality industry
	Professional certification (e.g., ACA, ACCA, or equivalent) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of internal audit practices, risk management, and compliance
	Experience with hotel systems/POS and revenue audit processes is an added advantage
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and analytical skills
	Strong communication and report-writing skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical Thinking
	Attention to Detail
	Risk Assessment &amp; Control
	Integrity &amp; Confidentiality
	Problem-Solving
	Communication &amp; Reporting.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Opportunity to work in a growing hospitality organization
	Career development and professional growth.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;oluwaseyi.agunbiade@yiwill.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Internal Auditor Job at Yimei Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market. The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos. Yimei focuses on delivering quality hospitality services by combining modern hotel management systems, customer-centric service, and strategic business expansion. The company also supports hotel owners and investors through professional management solutions, operational systems, and market-driven strategies.

Driven by a vision to become a leading hotel operator in Africa, Yimei Nigeria Limited continues to grow its presence by developing new properties and expanding partnerships within the hospitality industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Internal Auditor to evaluate and improve the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance processes.
	The ideal candidate will have experience in the hospitality industry and will ensure compliance with financial regulations, company policies, and operational standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct regular audits of financial records, operational processes, and internal controls
	Review revenue streams including room sales, POS transactions, and other hospitality-related income
	Verify accuracy of financial reports, reconciliations, and accounting records
	Monitor compliance with company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Identify risks, control gaps, and areas for process improvement
	Prepare audit reports and present findings with actionable recommendations
	Follow up on audit issues to ensure timely resolution
	Perform inventory audits (food & beverage, store, and other operational assets)
	Evaluate fraud risks and support investigations where necessary
	Collaborate with finance and operations teams to strengthen internal controls.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in auditing, preferably within the hospitality industry
	Professional certification (e.g., ACA, ACCA, or equivalent) is an advantage
	Strong knowledge of internal audit practices, risk management, and compliance
	Experience with hotel systems/POS and revenue audit processes is an added advantage
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and analytical skills
	Strong communication and report-writing skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Key Competencies:


	Analytical Thinking
	Attention to Detail
	Risk Assessment & Control
	Integrity & Confidentiality
	Problem-Solving
	Communication & Reporting.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Opportunity to work in a growing hospitality organization
	Career development and professional growth.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market. The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands.

Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos. Yimei focuses on delivering quality hospitality services by combining modern hotel management systems, customer-centric service, and strategic business expansion. The company also supports hotel owners and investors through professional management solutions, operational systems, and market-driven strategies.

Driven by a vision to become a leading hotel operator in Africa, Yimei Nigeria Limited continues to grow its presence by developing new properties and expanding partnerships within the hospitality industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Officer to manage the sourcing and purchasing of materials, equipment, and services for our construction and hospitality projects.
	The ideal candidate will ensure cost-effective procurement, timely delivery, and compliance with company policies and project requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Source and procure construction materials, equipment, and services in line with project needs
	Prepare and process purchase requisitions, purchase orders, and supplier contracts
	Identify reliable vendors, negotiate prices, terms, and delivery schedules
	Maintain an updated supplier database and build strong vendor relationships
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with store and site teams to avoid shortages
	Ensure timely delivery of materials to project sites
	Conduct market research to stay updated on pricing trends and product availability
	Ensure compliance with company procurement policies and procedures
	Verify quality and specifications of purchased items before acceptance
	Track procurement activities and prepare regular reports
	Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and finance teams for procurement planning.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 5 years of experience in procurement (preferably in construction or hospitality industry)
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Good knowledge of local market suppliers and pricing (Nigeria market knowledge is an advantage)
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word)
	Strong organizational and record-keeping skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;oluwaseyi.agunbiade@yiwill.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Procurement Officer Job at Yimei Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Yimei Nigeria Limited is a hospitality and hotel management company operating as part of the broader Yimei Group, an international hotel chain focused on the fast-growing African market. The company specializes in hotel development, management, and franchising, offering a range of accommodation options from budget to upscale through its various hotel brands.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Established in Nigeria in 2020, Yimei Nigeria Limited is headquartered in Ikeja, Lagos, and has rapidly expanded its footprint with multiple hotel operations across Lagos. Yimei focuses on delivering quality hospitality services by combining modern hotel management systems, customer-centric service, and strategic business expansion. The company also supports hotel owners and investors through professional management solutions, operational systems, and market-driven strategies.

Driven by a vision to become a leading hotel operator in Africa, Yimei Nigeria Limited continues to grow its presence by developing new properties and expanding partnerships within the hospitality industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Yimei Nigeria Limited is seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Officer to manage the sourcing and purchasing of materials, equipment, and services for our construction and hospitality projects.
	The ideal candidate will ensure cost-effective procurement, timely delivery, and compliance with company policies and project requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Source and procure construction materials, equipment, and services in line with project needs
	Prepare and process purchase requisitions, purchase orders, and supplier contracts
	Identify reliable vendors, negotiate prices, terms, and delivery schedules
	Maintain an updated supplier database and build strong vendor relationships
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with store and site teams to avoid shortages
	Ensure timely delivery of materials to project sites
	Conduct market research to stay updated on pricing trends and product availability
	Ensure compliance with company procurement policies and procedures
	Verify quality and specifications of purchased items before acceptance
	Track procurement activities and prepare regular reports
	Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and finance teams for procurement planning.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 5 years of experience in procurement (preferably in construction or hospitality industry)
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Good knowledge of local market suppliers and pricing (Nigeria market knowledge is an advantage)
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word)
	Strong organizational and record-keeping skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Consultant",
  "description": "Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today&rsquo;s fast-changing market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Consultant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We are looking for a qualified Business Consultant to help our clients reform their operations and support their business by providing intuitive guidance.


Responsibilities


	Organize and execute assigned business projects on behalf of clients (recruiting, payroll, promotional campaigns etc.) according to client&rsquo;s requirements
	Meet with assigned clients when needed and perform an initial assessment of a problematic situation
	Collect information about the client&rsquo;s business through a variety of methods (shadowing, interviews, surveys, reading reports etc.)
	Analyze and interpret data to unearth weaknesses and problems, and comprehend the causes
	Formulate recommendations and solutions with attention to a client&rsquo;s wishes, capabilities and limitations forming concise reports
	Present findings and suggestions to clients with ample justification and practical advice
	Develop detailed business plans to drive small or radical changes
	Assist the client in implementing the plan and resolve any occasional discrepancies
	Provide guidance for any occurring problems and issues.


Requirements


	Experience as business consultant or equivalent
	Knowledge of diverse business matters such as IT, Marketing, HR etc.
	Proficiency in MS Office
	Familiarity with a wide selection of business management software (CRM, ERP etc.) and databases
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills
	Analytical mind with excellent data collection and analysis skills
	Aptitude in creative problem-solving.


&nbsp;Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to:&nbsp;anasatianticserviceslimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-27",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Anas Atiantic Services Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198011"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Business Consultant Job at Anas Atiantic Services Limited




        
    

        
        Anas Atiantic Services Limited is a dynamic and client-centric business services company registered and operating in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that help businesses grow, compete, and connect in today’s fast-changing market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Consultant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We are looking for a qualified Business Consultant to help our clients reform their operations and support their business by providing intuitive guidance.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Organize and execute assigned business projects on behalf of clients (recruiting, payroll, promotional campaigns etc.) according to client’s requirements
	Meet with assigned clients when needed and perform an initial assessment of a problematic situation
	Collect information about the client’s business through a variety of methods (shadowing, interviews, surveys, reading reports etc.)
	Analyze and interpret data to unearth weaknesses and problems, and comprehend the causes
	Formulate recommendations and solutions with attention to a client’s wishes, capabilities and limitations forming concise reports
	Present findings and suggestions to clients with ample justification and practical advice
	Develop detailed business plans to drive small or radical changes
	Assist the client in implementing the plan and resolve any occasional discrepancies
	Provide guidance for any occurring problems and issues.


Requirements


	Experience as business consultant or equivalent
	Knowledge of diverse business matters such as IT, Marketing, HR etc.
	Proficiency in MS Office
	Familiarity with a wide selection of business management software (CRM, ERP etc.) and databases
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills
	Analytical mind with excellent data collection and analysis skills
	Aptitude in creative problem-solving.


 Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand&rsquo;s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria&rsquo;s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Procurement Officer&nbsp;

Job ID: 1681
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria

Job Purpose


	To develop, implement and manage effective, best-in-class systems for the effective management of supplier relationships and interfaces with Food Concepts.


Responsibilities
Procurement Operations:


	Negotiate with external vendors to secure advantageous terms
	Plan and approve the ordering of necessary goods and services
	Track and report key functional metrics to reduce expenses and improve effectiveness
	Collaborate with key persons to ensure clarity of the specifications and expectations of the company
	Prepare purchasing reports for all the agreements they have with suppliers and vendors
	Prepare plans for the purchase of equipment, services, and supplies.
	Follow and enforce the company&#39;s procurement policies and procedures.
	Manage inventories and maintaining accurate purchase and pricing records.
	Maintain and update supplier information such as qualifications, delivery times, product ranges, etc.
	Maintain good supplier relations and negotiating contracts.
	Research and evaluate prospective suppliers.


Risk and Cost Management:


	Perform risk management for supply contract
	Examine and test existing contracts
	Ensure clear audit trail, process transparency and clarity of roles of individual parties in the Procurement process.


KPI


	Quality of business suppliers
	Procurement turnaround time
	Quality of goods/services procured.


Requirements


	A good first degree in social/management/physical sciences
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a similar role, especially in the QSR/Food Industry sector
	Membership of the CIPS, CILS, CILCS, CISCOM, Lean Six Sigma or any other related professional qualification is an added advantage
	Knowledge of Inventory Management
	Knowledge of Cost management
	Knowledge of applicable legislations, as well as policies and procedures
	Demonstrates expertise in Procurement management
	Quality of risk management/prevention of risk exposure in the procurement process.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-27",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-28",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Food Concepts Plc"
    
  },

Procurement Officer Job at Food Concepts Plc




        
    

        
        Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand’s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria’s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Procurement Officer 

Job ID: 1681
Job Location: Nigeria

Job Purpose


	To develop, implement and manage effective, best-in-class systems for the effective management of supplier relationships and interfaces with Food Concepts.


Responsibilities
Procurement Operations:


	Negotiate with external vendors to secure advantageous terms
	Plan and approve the ordering of necessary goods and services
	Track and report key functional metrics to reduce expenses and improve effectiveness
	Collaborate with key persons to ensure clarity of the specifications and expectations of the company
	Prepare purchasing reports for all the agreements they have with suppliers and vendors
	Prepare plans for the purchase of equipment, services, and supplies.
	Follow and enforce the company's procurement policies and procedures.
	Manage inventories and maintaining accurate purchase and pricing records.
	Maintain and update supplier information such as qualifications, delivery times, product ranges, etc.
	Maintain good supplier relations and negotiating contracts.
	Research and evaluate prospective suppliers.


Risk and Cost Management:


	Perform risk management for supply contract
	Examine and test existing contracts
	Ensure clear audit trail, process transparency and clarity of roles of individual parties in the Procurement process.


KPI


	Quality of business suppliers
	Procurement turnaround time
	Quality of goods/services procured.


Requirements


	A good first degree in social/management/physical sciences
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a similar role, especially in the QSR/Food Industry sector
	Membership of the CIPS, CILS, CILCS, CISCOM, Lean Six Sigma or any other related professional qualification is an added advantage
	Knowledge of Inventory Management
	Knowledge of Cost management
	Knowledge of applicable legislations, as well as policies and procedures
	Demonstrates expertise in Procurement management
	Quality of risk management/prevention of risk exposure in the procurement process.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Social Media Manager / Content Creator (Showroom) Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator (Showroom)
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work mode: Fully onsite (Mon-Sat)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Responsible for building the brand’s online presence, showcasing projects, and generating leads through engaging content.


Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality content (photos, videos, reels) of showroom and projects
	Post consistently on Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and WhatsApp
	Showcase kitchens, wardrobes, TV units, and completed projects
	Cover site progress and transformations
	Respond to messages and convert inquiries into leads
	Work closely with sales team to push promotions
	Run ads campaigns (if needed)
	Track engagement and improve performance


Requirements


	Experience in social media / content creation
	Strong video editing skills
	Creative eye for interior design content
	Good communication skills
	Experience in interior / design industry is a strong advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
